resources.string: The page stays silent. Set an API key in Settings.
No answer reaches me. The world beyond this page is out of earshot.
I listened a long while, and nothing came. Rest your pen again and I will try once more.
Your key was refused. Look to it in Settings.
Too many questions, too quickly. Let the ink settle a moment.

Write, then rest your pen. I read the page and answer here.
Write again while I am thinking, and I begin afresh.
Turn your pen over to erase.
Ask me: what do you remember?
Or: show me what I wrote about the garden.
Press and hold the mark in the corner for settings.
Draw a ? for this page. Touch the pen to return.
%1$d pages remembered, on this tablet only
Nothing is stored, and no past pages are sent.
Every remembered page will be deleted from this tablet. This cannot be undone.
